'''βàöf-ng-m-w''' ('''kafangmewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photolithoprint|photolithoprint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photolithoprint|photolithoprint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöf-ng-m-w
|-
! Lemma
| kafangmewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifangmewoko|thifangmewoko]] || [[word:jifangmewoko|jifangmewoko]] || [[word:shifangmewoko|shifangmewoko]] || [[word:kifangmewoko|kifangmewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufangmewoko|thuthufangmewoko]] || [[word:jujufangmewoko|jujufangmewoko]] || [[word:shushufangmewoko|shushufangmewoko]] || [[word:kukufangmewoko|kukufangmewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufangmewoko|thufangmewoko]] || [[word:jufangmewoko|jufangmewoko]] || [[word:shufangmewoko|shufangmewoko]] || [[word:kufangmewoko|kufangmewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofangmewoko|thofangmewoko]] || [[word:jofangmewoko|jofangmewoko]] || [[word:shofangmewoko|shofangmewoko]] || [[word:kofangmewoko|kofangmewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠfangmewoko|thΟΠfangmewoko]] || [[word:jΟΠfangmewoko|jΟΠfangmewoko]] || [[word:shΟΠfangmewoko|shΟΠfangmewoko]] || [[word:kΟΠfangmewoko|kΟΠfangmewoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
